programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lana springs into action when she learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction; when Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde, as Ace and Jack, take on the case.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo se estremece cuando ve que es el día de los inocentes, Bob Esponja hace bromas en el día de los inocentes. / Bob Esponja saca la espátula de Neptuno, pero Neptuno lo reta al no creer que el la sacó.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio van a un lugar donde hay muchos anzuelos y ellos juegan con los anzuelos sin saber que en verdad son muy peligrosos. / Bob Esponja gana un concurso y gana la trompa de alarma de Triton y Chico Percebe.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja olvida como amarrarse las agujetas y deberá volver a aprender pero aparentemente nadie en Fondo de Bikini puede ayudarle. / Don Cangrejo es llevado al hospital y Calamardo queda a cargo del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Todo Fondo de Bikini huye de Bob Esponja, Patricio le dice que es por ser feo pero en realidad Bob Esponja tiene mal aliento. / Perlita obtiene un trabajo en el Crustáceo Cascarudo, se encarga de ponerlo a la moda.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio se obsesiona con Bob Esponja por todos los premios que ha ganado y él nunca ha podido ganar uno. / Bob Esponja crea un amigo hecho de burbuja pero su nuevo amigo causa muchos problemas a donde quiera que va.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo le da a Bob Esponja un pastel explosivo por error como regalo de intercambio del día de la hermandad. / Plankton construye un robot con la apariencia de Don Cangrejo para obtener la fórmula de la Cangreburguer.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Arenita se va de vieje y les deja al cuidado todas sus mascotas a Bob Esponja y Patricio. / A Bob Esponja se le ocurre vender cangreburguers de colores para hacerlas más llamativas y atraer más clientes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Cuando Bob Esponja llega al Crustáceo Cascarudo, todos se burlan de el por tener un beso de su abuela en la frente. / Calamardo esta harto de vivir junto a Bob Esponja y Patricio, decide irse a vivir a otra ciudad.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Cuando Bob Esponja llega al Crustáceo Cascarudo, todos se burlan de el por tener un beso de su abuela en la frente. / Calamardo esta harto de vivir junto a Bob Esponja y Patricio, decide irse a vivir a otra ciudad.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En este capítulo Fondo de Bikini tiene su primer día de Navidad. Cuando Arenita le habla sobre la navidad a Bob Esponja, éste intentará hacer todo lo posible para llevar a Fondo de Bikini la primer Navidad.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Arenita esta hibernando, Bob Esponja y Patricio entran a su casa, donde está nevando dentro. / Bob Esponja se pone celoso cuando Gary pasa más tiempo con Patricio que con él.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Señora Puff le entrega su licencia de conducir a Bob pero luego se da cuenta que las consecuencias serán terribles. / En una convención Bob Esponja conoce al pepino Kevin, quien le da la oportunidad de unirse a su club.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Sirenoman y Chico Percebe se van de viaje y dejan su cueva al cuidado de Bob Esponja y Patricio. / Bob Esponja cuanta chistes en el Crustáceo Cascarudo, pero nadie se ríe, pero cuando cuenta chistes de ardillas todos comienzan a reírse.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita deciden hacer una competencia para ver quien es mejor de los dos. / Una Ostra en cautiverio comienza a llorar durante la visita de Bob Esponja y Patricio, justo después de que Bob le lanza un maní para despertarla.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo se topan con el barco del Holandés Volador, quien los obliga a trabajar en el o ser comidos. / Llega el día en el que Gary debe de tomar un baño, pero él se niega y Bob Esponja hará todo lo posible.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo pierde una apuesta y Bob Esponja es obligado a ir a trabajar en el Balde de Bocados. / Bob Esponja y Patricio encuentran un lápiz mágico que da vida a todo lo que dibujan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio tiene una caja secreta y no deja que nadie vea dentro de ella. Pero Bob Esponja no aguanta la curiosidad e intenta ver dentro de ella. / Calamardo forma una banda musical cuando Calamarino Elegante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo le cuenta a Bob una historia de terror para burlarse de él. Luego de asustarlo, Calamardo le dice la verdad a Bob. / Don Cangrejo conoce a la Señora Puff y se enamora de ella, esto le provoca que gaste su dinero sin control.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Señora Puff deja de tarea hacer un ensayo acerca de que no hacer ante una luz de parada. Pero a Bob Esponja no se le ocurren ideas. / Patricio recibe la visita de sus padres, pero quiere que ya no piensen que es un despistado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio conocen una nueva palabra y la empiezan a decir una y otra vez sin saber que es una mala palabra. / Calamardo comienza a dar clases de arte, y Bob Esponja es tan bueno que hace una gran estatua.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo descubre que la jalea de medusa en las Cangreburguers le gusta mucho a los clientes. / Bob Esponja y Patricio se vuelven contrincantes en la batalla más importante de comida.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo y Bob Esponja hacen una huelga en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Una enorme lombriz ataca a Fondo de Bikini y Arenita decide enfrentarla sola sin escuchar las advertencias de Bob.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite intercambiar vidas con Don Cangrejo / Bob Esponja se ofrece como voluntario para el empleo como Guarda Vidas, el único problema es que no sabe nadar

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo se encuentran perdidos, con solo una caracola mágica para guiarlos / Es Primavera en Fondo de Bikini y Bob Esponja encuentra un salvaje caballo de mar y decide quedarse con ella

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja le ofrece varias veces a Calamardo probar una Cangreburger. Él se niega hasta que descubre que le gustan / Hay un nuevo alumno en la clase de botes, y quiere patearle el trasero a Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Un Inspector de salud aparece en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. Bob y Don Cangrejo ven en las noticias que hay alguien que está haciendo pasar por Inspector / Bob y Patricio compran una pantalla de televisión sólo para usar la caja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: A Tritón se le cae su cinturón, Bob lo encuentra e intenta devolverlo. A causa de un pequeño accidente, Bob Esponja encoge todo Fondo de Bikini / Una vez más la Señora Puff vuelve a manejar con Bob, quien choca contra un camión de jugo

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Comienza a nevar en Fondo de Bikini y todos sus habitantes salen a jugar en la nieve. Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo hacen una guerra de bolas de nieve / Don Cangrejo le vende a Bob Esponja un sombrero por poco dinero

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Katakuri retires to his sanctuary to enjoy the merienda - a chance for him to savor the sweetness of his crew of chefs and replenish his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy discovers the secret to Katakuri's unearthly fighting ability, and just might have a solution for how to stop him! Meanwhile, at the Sweets Factory, Pudding receives a call from Brulee who has bad news for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs out of his Haki and has to buy some time - in the most peculiar way! Meanwhile the Big Mom Pirates mobilize their entire fleet to squelch the pirate threat, and the replacement cake nears completion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Chiffon comes under attack, Sanji must choose between defending her or revealing himself to his enemies! Meanwhile, Luffy uses Brulee as a human shield to avoid the wrath of Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bege arrives on the scene, seemingly willing to risk it all to bring down the Big Mom Pirates in a blaze of glory, but of course he has a trick up his sleeve! Meanwhile, Luffy keeps on the move to regain his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Bege get together and get off of Cacao Island successfully, but their plan is in jeopardy as Oven begins to boil the sea itself! As Chiffon and the others who are on the ship are cornered, a surprising savior comes in to fight Oven!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats! Three fleets converge and try to squeeze the life from them! Daifuku himself take the lead! But Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs in to action under the light of the moon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The much anticipated wedding cake is on its way, but there is a debate at the last minute! Shouldn't this opportunity be used to slip poison into Big Mom's meal to topple the Emperor of the Sea?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, through sheer force of will, can almost use his Haki to battle Katakuri! Meanwhile, the Sunny catches fire while the Straw Hats try to kick out Big Mom, but that's when Jimbei steps up to the plate and takes a swing at her!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries to enhance his Haki to foresee Katakuri's next move, but Katakuri's attacks keep pulling him down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The cake is finally prepared and brought before Big Mom! With the end of her vicious rampage in sight, there is a chance for the Straw Hats to flee! Big Mom's crew is forced to decide who to attack! Meanwhile, Luffy grows ever closer to using his Haki!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hiding her presence, Flampe shoots her blowgun at Luffy to support her dear brother Katakuri. Meanwhile, Oven launches a dastardly plan to fence Luffy in - by destroying every mirror on the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Katakuri notices his sister Flampe is sneakily providing poison needle back up in the shadows. Becoming enraged, he takes unexpected action that surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Smoothie increases her size and closes in on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leans on his training to bring out the power of his Haki! Meanwhile, the children of Big Mom gather as a massive force, ready to smash Luffy and the Straw Hats. Their resentment at being embarrassed fuels their desire to get revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels! Their powers ensure that each blow could be the last! Luffy must rely on his training, let all his thoughts out, and keep pushing on! Meanwhile, Sanji is about to land at Cacao Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close! But even if he is able to pull out victory in the last moment, can he remember the key to escaping the Mirrorworld?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges safely! And Pekoms' bravery ensures he and the Straw Hats have a fighting chance! But can they withstand the full force of the Big Mom Pirates? At the last moment - a surprise explodes onto the scene!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain, Luffy! But the arrival of Germa has complicated matters. Whose side do these powerful superhumans fight on? In the end, sisterly love will see Sanji saved!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Sanji are safe! But the critical moment approaches - the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! Will it be sweet release or bitter defeat? Meanwhile, a cunning pincer attack leaves the Straw Hats hopelessly trapped.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the help of the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape! And the Sun Pirates bid farewell to their former captain. Mama finally tastes the Wedding Cake and the results are positively scrumptious!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Big Mom Pirates fooled! The Straw Hats have eluded their would-be tormentors with the help of the Sun Pirates! However, as the fleet of the Big Mom Pirates is still coming after them, Jimbei makes a crucial decision to help the Sunny to get away.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies and friends, and would-be lovers. As the sea opens before them, what price has been paid for their escape?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's recent exploits make their way around the world! The reputation of this mighty pirate begins to grow as all eyes look towards the Straw Hats' next move! Also - German 66 leaves an artifact behind which excites the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the royals make their way to the Reverie, the mighty Navy takes all precautions to make sure they don't fall prey to kidnappings! At the vanguard is Koby, who glimpses Luffy's exploits and remembers their shared past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A vicious pirate group led by Pinkbeard who describes himself as one of Blackbeard's affiliates attacks a town in the Kingdom of Lulucia while their king and able-bodied soldiers have gone to the Reverie. And four bizarre individuals come to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At New Marineford, Sakazuki, the new Admiral of the Fleet, hears the news about Luffy and recalls the tumultuous Paramount War that haunts the Navy! That game-changing war has repercussions that last into the present!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nobles from around the world gather for the Reverie as the echoes of the Paramount War resound! Among them are Shirahoshi and her family from the Ryugu Kingdom under the sea. Meanwhile, Admiral Fujitora has a conversation with his new colleague.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: When a prominent Atlanta judge is shot dead in her upscale home, detectives must figure out if the killing was payback from any criminals she had put behind bars, or if someone close had a personal score to settle.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: The senseless murder of a 16-year-old girl in her family's jewelry store rocks the quiet hamlet of Marietta; determined to give her family closure, detectives pull out all the stops to track down the cold-hearted culprit.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: A flower delivery turns deadly when a woman is executed after answering the door at her wealthy Buckhead estate; the hunt for the mastermind behind the assassination takes investigators around the world and back.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: A prestigious Atlanta college is stunned when one of its own students is horrifically tortured and murdered off campus; investigators discover that greed may have led to the promising athlete's tragic end.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: When a member of one of Atlanta's most beloved religious dynasties is brutally gunned down while protecting his family, detectives piece together a complicated puzzle to track down the killers.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: An up-and-coming Atlanta actor's dreams of stardom are shattered after he is viciously bludgeoned to death; when their last lead vanishes, homicide investigators turn to a new technology to help them pinpoint his cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: When a millionaire playboy is found burned to death inside his Buckhead mansion, investigators must navigate a love triangle to find the killer.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: After the proprietor of the thriving Silent Movie Theater is viciously gunned down in his own lobby, the LAPD leans on luck, a hit TV series and its vast network of informants to uncover a conspiracy to commit murder.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a beloved model, actress and former Los Angeles Raiderette cheerleader vanishes in broad daylight after leaving her Hermosa Beach home, a media frenzy engulfs the entire city as detectives embark on a desperate search for a sociopathic killer.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: Detectives are plunged into a world of occult worship and shadowy characters as they try to solve the brutal murder of a promising UCLA student found butchered in a railroad tunnel with a diabolical reputation.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: The shocking murder of a Van Nuys newlywed goes cold for 23 years until detectives bent on justice revisit the brutal evidence, including a bite mark on the victim's arm that leads them to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a well-liked Hollywood cameraman is brutally murdered in his home, detectives trace a tangled web of lies that leads them to yet another body and a killer who will do anything to realize the California dream.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a recently engaged Manhattan Beach police officer is gunned down during a routine traffic stop, detectives rely on the eyewitness account of a traumatized young boy to track down a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a popular restaurateur disappears, investigators must rely on a patchwork of witnesses and a local journalist to uncover treacherous secrets… all of which leads them to a grisly killer with an unappetizing M.O.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles
programme.desc: A young woman with film industry dreams disappears after leaving her home for a movie audition, leaving detectives to navigate Hollywood's murky underbelly in search of a treacherous serial predator.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Los Angeles

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupts a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Yellowbeard

programme.title: The Man Who Fell To Earth
programme.desc: Thomas Jerome Newton (David Bowie) is a humanoid alien who comes to Earth to get water for his dying planet. He starts a high technology company to get the billions of dollars he needs to build a return spacecraft.

programme.title: Amityville 3-D
programme.desc: A reporter moves into the ominous Long Island house to debunk it of the recent supernatural events but is instead besieged by the evil manifestations of a demon-from-hell lurking in the basement.

programme.title: Amityville II: The Possession
programme.desc: An Italian-American family move into a house built on an ancient Indian burial ground. The oldest son is possessed by an evil spirit, and is forced to murder his family. The family's priest feels responsible, and tries to save the possessed boy's soul.

programme.title: Battle Royale
programme.desc: A group of students from a Japanese high school are forced to compete in a battle, killing one another until only one is left standing.

programme.title: Three Kings
programme.desc: At the end of the Gulf War, a small group of American soldiers plots to steal a cache of gold near their Iraqi desert base. The men embark on a journey that forces them to confront their fears and flaws, while altering their lives forever.

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: An adrenaline-fueled thrill ride through a near-future fractured America balanced on the razor's edge. A group of journalists (led by Kirsten Dunst) must race through battlefields to the White House before DC falls.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a brash Navy lawyer who's teamed with a gung-ho litigator (Demi Moore) in a politically explosive murder case, defending two Marines accused of killing a fellow soldier

programme.title: Rain Man

programme.title: Mermaids

programme.title: Aeon Flux

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon

programme.title: Space: 1999

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Mars: Adapt or Leave
programme.desc: Air, water, food, electricity and fuel all the essentials to explore the solar system, this episode explores the innovative plans for astronauts to grow their own food and extract water and fuel at their destinations.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Emissiaries
programme.desc: NASA and others are developing new innovative propulsion systems, Ion thrusters, solar sails and the science fiction 'Warp drive' is not as far away as once thought.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Danger, Asteroids Ahead
programme.desc: The threat of an asteroid strike is a very real danger in our solar system, mankind is now in a position to defend the planet from such an eventuality.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: The life cycle of stars reveal to us the past and the future of Earth and ourselves.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hidden Havens: Icy Moons
programme.desc: There are hundreds of moons in our solar system. Could one of them be a hidden haven that harbors alien life forms?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Icy Gems: Frozen Moons
programme.desc: In the far depths of space, out of reach of the Sun's warmth, water can only exist in a super solid state. Some small moons, in fact, are made entirely of ice. What stories do these Icy Gems have to tell about our solar system?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Shooting Gallery: Asteroids and Comets
programme.desc: Scientist long thought that our solar system consisted of the sun, the planets, and their moons. We soon found that we are far from alone, often coming into contact with asteroids, comets, and other debris.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Galactic Visions: Alien Worlds
programme.desc: The diversity, complexity, and downright beauty of our own solar system is astounding. Could such beauty exist in other parts of the universe as well? Thanks to modern science, we now have the capability to see for ourselves.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Mars: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Landing a spacecraft on Mars is no easy task given our limited knowledge of the planet. The difference between success and failure can rely on the most minute detail.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Giant Planets: Lords of Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity is one of the most basic and powerful forces shaping our universe. Discover its nature within our own solar system, from the smallest moons to the largest planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Outer Limits: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: For centuries, it was was thought that Saturn was the most distant planet in our Solar System. With the evolution of the telescope, we discovered the rest of our planets, both elusive and mysterious.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Borderland

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Silent Partner
programme.desc: Although we have put man on the moon, our silent partner still holds many mysteries. What haven't we seen? What haven't we discovered?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Rocky Shores
programme.desc: The arid shores of other planets tell the stories of their past. What did they look like, and could they have ever supported life?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fountain of Creation

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Windows to Other Worlds S1 Ep1

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hidden Havens: Icy Moons
programme.desc: There are hundreds of moons in our solar system. Could one of them be a hidden haven that harbors alien life forms?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer, whose style is very different from Ash’s, and the two of them have a unique competition to compare those styles!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: When Dawn arrives in Daybreak Town for her next Pokémon Contest, she finds an old rival waiting to challenge her. Ash and Brock learn something new about their friend!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: The Daybreak Town Pokémon Contest is heating up after the first round. Dawn and Ursula find themselves forming a rivalry for the ages!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Team Rocket comes up with a brand new strategy for stealing Pokémon and successfully swipe Pikachu, Piplup, and Empoleon.

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Ash’s Gible is working so hard to master its Draco Meteor attack, but it keeps going off course and hitting Piplup. Piplup has had just about enough!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Ash has arrived in Sunyshore City for his next Gym battle, but the gym leader, Volkner, has decided he’s not accepting any more challengers!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: The Team Rocket trio want to steal Sunyshore Tower, so they come up with a novel way to do it!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: When our heroes agree to substitute for Dawn’s mother, Johanna, in teaching a Pokémon class, one of their students ends up teaching Dawn a valuable lesson!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: As our heroes continue their Sinnoh region journey, they come across a determined, upbeat Pokémon Ranger on a mission to capture a rare Heatran!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras llegar a Pueblo Azalea, Ash descuidadamente provoca a sus residentes, quienes adoran a SlowPoké. Y las cosas sólo empeoran cuando llega el Equipo Rocket, tratando de robar hasta al último SlowPoké. ¿Qué podrá hacer Ash?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tal como prometió al Profesor Oak, Ash entrega la misteriosa Bola GS a un renovado experto en Pokébolas. Pero el fruto de su trabajo casi se arruina cuando el Equipo Rocket aparece en escena.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash por fin llega al Gimnasio Azalea, pero Cyndaquil no tiene la energía para derrotar al Líder de Gimnasio. Conforme la batalla se enciende, Ash debe esforzarse al máximo para derrotar al poderoso Pokémon tipo Insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un Entrenador joven y poco experimentado asustó a su propio Farfetch'd. Nuestros héroes están felices de ayudarlo, pero tendrán que hallarlo antes que el Equipo Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un festival anual de intercambio Pokémon, un joven Entrenador busca un buen cambio por su Wobbuffet. El trío del Equipo Rocket también busca oportunidades, pero ambos grupos de Entrenadores obtienen más de lo que pidieron.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una inesperada competencia de apaga incendios Pokémon reúne a nuestros héroes con algunos viejos amigos, el escuadrón Squirtle! pero necesitan desesperadamente a un líder, así que Ash y Squirtle se reintegran a sus filas.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran con una guardería para Wooper y una emergencia requiere del maestro, nuestros héroes van al rescate. Pero, como siempre, el Equipo Rocket está a la vuelta de la esquina, y no trama nada bueno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia ciudad Caña Dorada, nuestros héroes se ven obligados a atravesar un túnel resguardado por un furioso Onix. Para hacer las cosas más difíciles, el equipo Rocket, Snubbull y Jigglypuff llegan de visita…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Siguiendo una serie de misteriosos robos, nuestros héroes descubren a unos Houndour luchando por sobrevivir en la naturaleza. Para ayudar a estos Pokémon ladrones a reformarse, Ash y sus amigos tendrán que ganarse su confianza.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre Ash y Misty se reaviva cuando ambos tratan de capturar a Totodile a la vez. Como no saben cuál Pokébola lo capturó, tendrán una batalla para decidir quién será el nuevo Entrenador de Totodile.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash oye de un entrenador virtualmente invencible, quiere ir a retarlo. Pero el Vulpix de Brock y el Cyndaquil de Ash reciben una paliza de su Skarmory, ¡a pesar de su ventaja de tipo! ¿Cómo logrará Ash derrotarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El Totodile de Ash se enamora de un Azumarill, que es la artista estrella de un circo Pokémon. Cuando el Equipo Rocket llega a robar el espectáculo, el corazón de Azumarill no será la única cosa que Totodile deba ganar.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash tiene la vista puesta en un raro Noctowl de un color inusual, pero este astuto Pokémon usa repetidamente Hipnosis para engañarlo. ¿Podrá Ash capturar a este Noctowl dormilón?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un ataque sorpresa de un grupo de Ursaring hace que nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket busquen refugio. En el caos, los grupos se separan, y las poco entusiasmadas parejas tienen que trabajar juntas. Pero, ¿por cuánto tiempo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras una advertencia en el bosque sobre un travieso Pokémon tipo Fantasma, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo donde todos usan tipos Psíquico para repelerlos. Pronto llegan temibles noticias: ¡un Gengar gigante anda suelto!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una repentina moda en la adivinación Pokémon resulta ser un plan para robar a los Pokémon de los Entrenadores locales. Pero esta vez Jessie, James y Meowth no son los responsables. ¿Quiénes son estos villanos?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash corre hacia Ciudad Viridian con su herido Pikachu, ahí se encuentra con Jessie, James, y Meowth del Equipo Rocket, así como con Misty, quien está molesta porque Ash descompuso su bicicleta.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre llega a urgencias con la piel azulada; una adolescente tiene dolores abdominales que los médicos no han podido diagnosticar durante años; y un médico lucha por salvar la vida del único superviviente de un accidente aéreo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Preston Pyper, de 15 años, llega a la sala de emergencias después de recibir una pelota de béisbol en la cabeza, el Dr. Jeffrey Keller cree que está lidiando con una conmoción cerebral menor.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un zombi de Halloween con un problema debajo del cinturón desconcierta a los médicos; cuando dos hombres inconscientes se ven involucrados en un accidente, un médico ayuda a la policía a determinar quién fue el ladrón de autos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When the Voyager stops to help an alien repair his ship, the alien switches bodies with Paris.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager comes across a space phenomenon that must be destroyed at all costs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay meets a woman he once loved, but he has no memory of her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Hundreds of years in the future, the Voyager crew is accused of murder.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An alien species tries to populate its planet by duplicating the Voyager crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: With the fate of the crew in her hands, Seven must face her deepest fears alone.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When Starfleet sends a ship to bring the Voyager crew home, it seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway's actions could cost the crew their chance of reaching home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The pupil becomes the teacher when a Borg drone is born on Voyager and Seven of Nine instructs him in the ways of humanity.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A need to test herself leads Torres down a path of self-destruction.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew discovers an alien training ground for the destruction of Earth.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With memories erased and identities changed, SG-1 find themselves trapped below a domed city on a planet of ice, toiling as slave laborers. Can they come to their senses and make a break for the surface, or will they remain enslaved underground?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a quirky conspiracy theorist contacts SG-1 claiming to know classified information about the Stargate, at first they think he's bluffing. But when they investigate his wild claims, they realize he's a lot closer to the truth than they thought.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When O'Neill and Teal'c take an SGC-modified Goa'uld glider out for a test flight, they lose control and are sucked into outer space by a Goa'uld tracking device. It's up to the team to rescue them, before they run out oxygen and life support.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Daniel Jackson returns to Chicago to attend the funeral of his mentor, a celebrated archaeologist, he soon realizes that the death is mysteriously connected to the recent discovery of a 10,000-year-old Egyptian artifact that might be cursed.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Arriving on New Athos for an overnight visit, Teyla and Dr. Keller discover the entire settlement abandoned and their own lives in jeopardy from the Bola Kai, a fierce warrior tribe. The pair must avoid capture until Atlantis sends a search party.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With still no trace of the Athosians, Teyla requests an off-world visit to meet with a seer, Davos, who may be able to help her find her people. Meanwhile on Atlantis, Agent Woolsey arrives to observe and review Col. Carter.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After working for countless hours on the Replicator coding, Dr. McKay reluctantly admits that he needs help from his sister, Jeanie. But she goes missing, McKay travels to Earth determined to find her and uncover who is behind the kidnapping.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: As Dr. McKay struggles to figure out why the stargate has been inoperable, a mysterious probe plunges into the city. A sweep of the probe offers McKay a shocking glimpse of nanite code before his diagnostic program crashes and all the data is lost.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Armed with the means to track Replicator ships, the Atlantis team strives to eliminate the Replicators once and for all. Now, the team rushes to evacuate those human settlements in the path of the advancing Replicator forces.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The Atlantis long-range sensors detect the signal of a subspace tracking device familiar to Dr. McKay. The team follows to signal to a damaged hive ship drifting in space. Amidst the ship’s records, they discover references to a secret Wraith base.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When an alarm sounds, McKay suspects that a highly infectious disease has triggered the city’s self-protection system. With vital systems affected, the Atlantis team finds themselves trapped in various sections of the city with no way out.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Wanting to maintain diplomatic relations, Sheppard and McKay accompany Harmony, a precocious young princess, on a mandatory rite of passage. However, they are unaware that she has enemies, and character flaws, yet to be dealt with.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Locked in a battle with a Drone Command Ship, the Destiny is surprised by the arrival of the aliens that abducted Rush and Chloe. After Destiny's position is revealed, the crew again comes under heavy attack. But this time, they have a plan.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the ship as Eli believes he’s found a way to dial Earth. But Dr. Rush has serious reservations about abandoning Destiny, and when the crew is interrupted by a distress call, it may just change the plans of the Destiny.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s cat Custard is shown to live a pampered, adored existence in Strawberry’s house. But Custard’s dream set-up is shattered by the sudden arrival of a rambunctious stray puppy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Conniving Peppermint Fizz talks the other kids into a competition to see whose pet is best. Peppermint cheats so that her pet, Cola Chameleon, wins best pet.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids’ play. She’s the only one with four legs. There’s no one like her to talk to and share her feelings.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki falls under a sleeping enchantment and needs a moving music box to cure her. // There's an epic traffic jam in Rainbow Village until Police Officer Rainbow Ruby arrives to help.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.desc: There’s someone…or something strange in the neighborhood, and the kids imagine the worst.

programme.desc: When ghosts destroy a student's life and popularity in school, she dedicates her life to hunting ghosts. Now Danny has to deal with a threat only a few lockers down the hall. and worse? Danny's best friend, Tucker, has a crush on her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team considers using their precious Express Pass after playful Ghanaian locals give some teams a headache while they struggle to complete the high-stakes roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A challenging detour tests one couple's relationship, while another team's Racer requires medical attention, threatening their position in the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After teams volunteer at a local school in Ghana, THE AMAZING RACE makes it's first-ever trip to the Arctic Circle, where one couple finds themselves in an unfortunate position and contemplate making a game changing decision.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A bay window is removed and reframed for a new. An old school is being restored into apartments for veterans. The underside of a deck is the "roof" of living space below. Pipe locations are discussed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An exterior wall is framed on ground and raised into place. A history of framing tools is given. Recessed lighting and electrical panels are discussed. An old ridge beam is replaced with three LVLs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy discusses the use of I-joists and LVL beams. Kevin meets woodworker Paul Grouthouse. Kevin and Charlie insulate the original dormers. Landscape designer shares her intentions for the front yard.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The multi-angled roof has been framed. A remote-controlled skylight is installed. Mini duct system is discussed. The homeowner's mother makes a glass mosaic table. Rotted wood gutter is replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New material is used for the house's exterior trim. Kevin visits a window restoration shop. Radiant floor heating is installed in the garage. The homeowners tile the basement bathroom.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The roof gets different types of underlayment. An oak mantle is installed. Brickwork is corrected. The old boiler is disassembled. Exterior clapboards are painted inside. A linear drain is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A composite deck is installed. The basement gets insulated. Unconventional HVAC zoning is discussed. Kevin tours a stove factory in Reading, PA. Solar panels and their backup system are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The master bathroom gets a plaster treatment. Windowsills are replicated in Dracut, MA. A kitchen garden, recessed lighting, and floating countertop are installed. New wood floors change directions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1880s Country Cape is finished. The cast arrives and reflects on the changes that have been made since Charlie's crew started work. The homeowners take Kevin and Tommy on a tour of the house.

programme.desc: Roger Cook removes an old tree that threatens to fall on a homeowner’s house. The guys ask, "What is it?" and Tom brings some character into a room by installing wood trim around a plain doorway.

programme.desc: In this episode: energy-efficient replacement windows, reducing the energy needed for heating water and improving heating and air conditioning systems to reduce electrical consumption.

programme.title: Juan Manuel Marquez vs Mike Alvarado
programme.desc: On May 17th, 2014, Juan Manuel Marquez fought Mike Alvarado in a WBO Welterweight Title eliminator at The Forum in Inglewood. Both fighters scored a knockdown in the bout, but it was Marquez that prevailed with a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ken Sigurani
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1998 Julio Cesar Chavez faced Ken Sigurani at the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket resulting in a technical knock out win for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Scott Walker
programme.desc: On February 9th, 1996 Julio Cesar Chavez and Scott Walker faced each other in a 10 round bout at the Cesars Palace Sports Pavilion in Las Vegas that ended in the second round by technical knockout for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Kelly Pavlik vs Jermain Taylor 2
programme.desc: On February 16th, 2008 Kelly Pavlik faced Jermain Taylor for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas the 12 round bout resulted in a unanimous decision win for Pavlik.

programme.title: Ken Norton vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1973 Ken Norton faced Muhammad Ali at the Sports Arena in San Diego for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles in this 12 round bout Ali suffered a broken jaw and Norton scored a victory over The Greatest.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Esteban Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Keyshawn Davis fought Esteban Sanchez in a lightweight bout at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Delivering a sixth round TKO, Davis showed his speed and agility and that he'll have a promising future in the lightweight division.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Jose Zaragoza
programme.desc: On December 11th, 2021, Keyshawn Davis and Jose Zaragoza fought at Madison Square Garden in New York resulting in Zaragoza going down twice in round two giving the victory to Keyshawn Davis.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Omar Tienda Bahena
programme.desc: On September 23rd, 2022 Keyshawn Davis fought Omar Tienda Bahena at the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ with Bahena going down in round 5 that solidfied Davis' win by technical knockout.

programme.title: Leon Spinks vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On February 15th, 1978 Leon Spinks fought Muhammad Ali for WBA & WBC World Heavyweight titles although Spinks defeated Ali he was stripped of the WBC title as he chose to fight The Greatest, Muhammad Ali instead of the #1 contender Ken Norton.

programme.title: Lloyd Honeyghan vs Donald Curry
programme.desc: On September 27th, 1986 Lloyd Honeyghan faced Donald Curry for the IBF, WBA and WBC World Welterweight title at the Caesars Palace in Atlantic City in a 15 round bout that ended in the sixth giving Honeyghan the win.

programme.title: Luis Alberto Lopez vs Gabe Flores
programme.desc: On September 10th, 2021, Luis Alberto Lopez fought Gabe Flores in a super featherweight bout in Tucson. In a surprising upset, Lopez won by a convincing unanimous decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquaio vs Timothy Bradley II
programme.desc: On April 12th, 2014 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO World Welterweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Chris Algieri
programme.desc: On November 23rd, 2014, Manny Pacquiao and Chris Algieri faced each other for the WBO Welterweight Title in Macao. Manny Pacquaio defeated Chris Algieri after knocking Algieri down six times and securing a unanimous decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs David Diaz
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao and David Diaz fought eachother at Mandalay Bay Events Center in Las Vegas for the WBC World Lightweight titles with Diaz going down in the ninth round Pacquiao secured his victory.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Erik Morales 1
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Erik Morales fought Manny Pacquiao for the WBC and IBA Super Featherweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight that went the distance, Morales got the best of Pacquiao who seemed to have an off-night.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Jeff Horn
programme.desc: On July 2nd, 2017 Manny Pacquiao battled Jeff Horn for the WBO World Welterweight title at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane in a 12 round bout that ended in a victory for Horn.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Spring brings a rush of warm weather and the big melt begins. The road is nearly empty as only the toughest or craziest truckers remain. There's a race to the finish between Alex, Hugh, Jay, and T.J.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: From its geological history going back millions of years to the origins of the indigenous Eskimos that have inhabited the land for hundreds of years, this one-hour special will examine in depth the changes that have taken place in Yellowknife.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers look back at their experiences during the last ice road season and explain what they do now that they're off the ice. Tensions are sure to be high as both Rick and Drew have not spoken to Hugh since leaving the ice roads prematurely.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers continue their look back at their experiences during the last ice road season and explain what they do now that they're off the ice. We'll also take a look at the town of Yellowknife--and the mining industry--and see what life is like.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On one of the coldest frontiers on the planet, the Ice Road Truckers brave treacherous terrain to deliver crucial supplies to northern diamond mines. Take a look back at the highs and lows of the first season.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It is a job only a few would dare. This year, four ice road truckers, Hugh, Alex, Rick, and Drew, return from last season to join Arctic veterans as they venture 200 miles north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After just two days in the Arctic, the critical demands of the oil exploration sites are testing the limits of the truckers and their machines. Both the veterans and rookies are delayed in the shop by mechanical failures.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Just five days into the Arctic adventure, Mother Nature is about to strike and wreak havoc on the ice roads. Making matters worse is a report of a trucker who has run off the road and is stranded on the weakest part.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Logging country is coming unglued. Rygaard is a war zone when the battle between chasers threatens to tear apart the entire crew. At Papac Alaska, Joe and Coatsy let the fists fly.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In this episode of Ax Men, it's out with the old, in with the new. King of the Mountain J.M. Browning returns with son Jesse leading the charge.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: While the competition between American loggers is more heated than ever... up north, there's a new game in town. Canadian top dogs are facing one of the toughest jobs ever.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: From coast to coast, logging companies are willing to do anything to stay on top. At Browning, the crew gambles on a slipping skyline.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of legendary angler Bill Dance. Meanwhile, Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons create a clone of Optimus Prime to lead the Autobots into a trap. When the imposter attempts to lead the others deep into a mine containing a substance lethal to Autobots, it becomes a question of which "Prime" is really Prime.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons discover the lost civilization of Atlantis in the depths of the ocean. Still inhabited, the lost city is led by a king as power-hungry and deceitful as Megatron. The two forces unite and besiege Washington, D.C. with an energy shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor, so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful “Heart of Cybertron.”

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful "Heart of Cybertron."

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons and Insecticons team up to attack a defense base filled with data that Megatron wants to get his hands on. When the Insecticons connect with the base's energy shield, they unexpectedly grow larger…and potentially explosive!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun due to a plan by Megatron and human industrialist Sean Burger. With the Autobots gone, the Decepticons are free to do as they please.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack, and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
